name: 32-kali bridal lehenga
description:
32-kali bridal lehenga crafted in rich silk and georgette with full flare, highlighted with gotta patti detailing on each panel and finished with a heavy gotta & lace border at the hem. 

Lehenga includes soft lining and double can-can for enhanced volume and graceful fall. 

Blouse made in matching fabric featuring intricate hand embroidery (zari, sequins) on neckline, sleeves, and back with tailored finishing. 

Dupatta in organza adorned with gotta patti border on all four sides, elegant lace edging. 

Overall ensemble offers a traditional bridal look with coordinated gotta and lace work across lehenga and dupatta for a rich, cohesive finish.

name: The Colorblock Muse
tagline: Rich Multicolor Palette with Traditional Motifs
description: This striking lehenga set features a contemporary patchwork-inspired print with rich jewel tones of red, teal, mustard, and olive, creating a bold yet balanced colour palette. The flared skirt is designed with neat pleats that give beautiful volume and movement, while the coordinated cropped blouse highlights the same geometric and traditional motifs for a chic, modern-ethnic look. Crafted in a lightweight, comfortable fabric, this outfit blends heritage-inspired patterns with a fresh, fashion-forward silhouette. Perfect for festive parties, pre-wedding functions, destination weddings, and statement evening looks.

name: Rangrez Ombre Festive Lehenga Set
tagline: Graceful Rose Pink to Olive Green Ombre Elegance
description: This stunning lehenga set features a graceful ombré-dyed skirt blending rich rose pink into olive green, creating a soft, flowy silhouette with beautiful movement. The lehenga is delicately embellished with scattered mirror and sequin butti work, while the hemline is highlighted with ornate embroidery for a luxurious finish. Paired with a heavily embroidered blouse and a contrasting dupatta with fine border detailing, this ensemble strikes the perfect balance between elegance and festive glamour. Ideal for weddings, festive functions, mehendi, sangeet, and evening celebrations, this outfit brings effortless charm with a modern ethnic twist.

name: Amber Glow Printed Lehenga Set
tagline: Vibrant Yellow with Floral Sequin Elegance
description: Step into effortless elegance with this stunning yellow printed lehenga set, designed for festive days and special celebrations. The lehenga features intricate all-over floral prints enhanced with delicate sequin and thread detailing, creating a rich handcrafted look. Paired with a coordinated printed blouse, the set is beautifully finished with antique lace borders that add a timeless, regal touch. The lightweight organza dupatta flows gracefully, giving the outfit a soft, airy finish and elevating the overall silhouette. Perfect for haldi ceremonies, festive gatherings, daytime weddings, and traditional celebrations, this ensemble blends vibrant color with classic craftsmanship for a standout ethnic look.
